Fact.Name: Required to file 1099
Fact.Description: Schedule E line A. Did you make any payments that would require you to file Form(s) 1099.

Fact.Name: Filed required 1099
Fact.Description: Schedule E line B. Did you or will you file all required Form(s) 1099.

Fact.Name: Type of property
Fact.Description: Schedule E line 1b. Type of property from list (1-8).

Fact.Name: Is royalty property
Fact.Description: Schedule E helper. True if property type is royalties (type 6).

Fact.Name: Rents received
Fact.Description: Schedule E line 3. Rents received.

Fact.Name: Royalties received
Fact.Description: Schedule E line 4. Royalties received.

Fact.Name: Advertising
Fact.Description: Schedule E line 5. Advertising.

Fact.Name: Auto and travel
Fact.Description: Schedule E line 6. Auto and travel.

Fact.Name: Cleaning and maintenance
Fact.Description: Schedule E line 7. Cleaning and maintenance.

Fact.Name: Commissions
Fact.Description: Schedule E line 8. Commissions.

Fact.Name: Insurance
Fact.Description: Schedule E line 9. Insurance.

Fact.Name: Legal and other professional fees
Fact.Description: Schedule E line 10. Legal and other professional fees.

Fact.Name: Management fees
Fact.Description: Schedule E line 11. Management fees.

Fact.Name: Mortgage interest
Fact.Description: Schedule E line 12. Mortgage interest paid to banks, etc.

Fact.Name: Other interest
Fact.Description: Schedule E line 13. Other interest.

Fact.Name: Repairs
Fact.Description: Schedule E line 14. Repairs.

Fact.Name: Supplies
Fact.Description: Schedule E line 15. Supplies.

Fact.Name: Taxes
Fact.Description: Schedule E line 16. Taxes.

Fact.Name: Utilities
Fact.Description: Schedule E line 17. Utilities.

Fact.Name: Depreciation expense or depletion
Fact.Description: Schedule E line 18. Depreciation expense or depletion.

Fact.Name: Other expenses
Fact.Description: Schedule E line 19. Other (list).

Fact.Name: Total expenses
Fact.Description: Schedule E line 20. Add lines 5 through 19.

Fact.Name: Gross rental income
Fact.Description: Schedule E helper. Rents received plus royalties received.

Fact.Name: Net rental income or loss
Fact.Description: Schedule E line 21. Subtract line 20 from line 3 (rents) and/or 4 (royalties).

Fact.Name: Deductible rental real estate loss
Fact.Description: Schedule E line 22. Deductible rental real estate loss after limitation, if any, on Form 8582.

Fact.Name: Total rents for all rental properties
Fact.Description: Schedule E line 23a. Total of all amounts reported on line 3 for all rental properties.

Fact.Name: Total royalties for all royalty properties
Fact.Description: Schedule E line 23b. Total of all amounts reported on line 4 for all royalty properties.

Fact.Name: Total mortgage interest for all properties
Fact.Description: Schedule E line 23c. Total of all amounts reported on line 12 for all properties.

Fact.Name: Total depreciation for all properties
Fact.Description: Schedule E line 23d. Total of all amounts reported on line 18 for all properties.

Fact.Name: Total expenses for all properties
Fact.Description: Schedule E line 23e. Total of all amounts reported on line 20 for all properties.

Fact.Name: Income
Fact.Description: Schedule E line 24. Add positive amounts shown on line 21. Do not include any losses.

Fact.Name: Losses
Fact.Description: Schedule E line 25. Add royalty losses from line 21 and rental real estate losses from line 22.

Fact.Name: Total rental real estate and royalty income or loss
Fact.Description: Schedule E line 26. Combine lines 24 and 25.

Fact.Name: Prior year unallowed loss
Fact.Description: Schedule E line 27. Are you reporting any loss not allowed in a prior year.

Fact.Name: Total partnership and S corporation income or loss
Fact.Description: Schedule E line 32. Total partnership and S corporation income or (loss). Combine lines 30 and 31.

Fact.Name: Total estate and trust income or loss
Fact.Description: Schedule E line 37. Total estate and trust income or (loss). Combine lines 35 and 36.

Fact.Name: REMIC income
Fact.Description: Schedule E line 39. Combine columns (d) and (e) from REMICs.

Fact.Name: Net farm rental income or loss
Fact.Description: Schedule E line 40. Net farm rental income or (loss) from Form 4835.

Fact.Name: Total income or loss
Fact.Description: Schedule E line 41. Combine lines 26, 32, 37, 39, and 40.

Fact.Name: Reconciliation of farming and fishing income
Fact.Description: Schedule E line 42. Gross farming and fishing income.

Fact.Name: Reconciliation for real estate professionals
Fact.Description: Schedule E line 43. Net income or (loss) from rental real estate activities with material participation.
